lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Alliance Chieftain ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara
sources.what: Alliance Chieftain shipyard page — hull stats, module sellers, tech brokers, and material traders.

sources.label: Fandom
sources.what: Alliance Chieftain lore, manufacturer, and role overview backing the dossier write-up.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Livestream build of an anti-Xeno Alliance Chieftain, working through module choices for AX combat.

sources.label: YouTube — Obsidian Ant
sources.what: First look at the Alliance Chieftain, taking it into combat against Thargoid Scouts.
